summary.lv: Mehatronikas inženieris APPLY komandā, kas izstrādā un integrē IoT sensoru risinājumus — PCB prototipēšana, iegultais C++ uz mikrokontrolleriem (ESP32/STM32/Raspberry Pi), bezvadu protokoli (BLE/LoRa/Zigbee/MQTT) un Python automatizācija.
summary.en: Mechatronics Engineer at APPLY designing and integrating IoT sensor solutions — PCB prototyping, embedded C++ on microcontrollers (ESP32/STM32/Raspberry Pi), wireless protocols (BLE/LoRa/Zigbee/MQTT) and Python automation.
